narrative:
Precinct Washington B (precinct in Muskingum County) has 772 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
